title: Guarja Shipyards
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Guarja Shipyards''' were a [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]. The Shipyards produced [[Dor'bulla-class warship|''Dor'bulla''-class warships]] and a number of knock-off [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. They covered approximately 20 square [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]].

==History==
A [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] named [[Odnalor Chull]] stole ships from [[Kukul]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], so he put a bounty on his head. <ref name="Bounty Hunter">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{Mo}}
